prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Modular 4.6L DOHC V8 (Intech engine code, specifically the 4V variant from the 1996-1998 Mark VIII LSC) with a forged rotating assembly from Manley Performance (forged crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods, and forged pistons) to handle 700+ HP reliably. Pair with a custom billet camshaft from Comp Cams (236°/244° duration, 0.600" lift) for aggressive overlap and high-RPM power.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a custom T4 divorced wastegate setup, feeding into a custom air-to-water intercooler system from Garrett Motion (core dimensions: 24" x 12" x 4.5") and a methanol injection kit from Snow Performance (Stage 3 kit with dual nozzles) to suppress detonation under boost.

Fuel system upgrade featuring dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors from Injector Dynamics, and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom tune from Lund Racing (specializing in Ford Modular engines). Pair with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system from Stainless Works, featuring 1.75" primary tubes and a 3.5" collector, terminating in a Borla Pro XS muffler for aggressive tone without drone.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (specifically the Mark VIII-specific design, not a generic kit) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser. Pair with a custom front splitter from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) and a rear wing from Seibon Carbon (dual-element GT-style, 60" span).

Suspension overhaul with a full Air Lift Performance 3P management system (dual compressors, 5-gallon tank) and custom valved Air Lift Performance struts (front and rear) for adjustable ride height and stance. Pair with BC Racing BR coilovers (custom valved for the Mark VIII’s weight distribution) for track use, and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full kit, including subframe bushings).

Wheel setup featuring custom 19" x 10" (front) and 19" x 11" (rear) forged wheels from Rotiform (LAS-R model, 5x114.3 bolt pattern, +25mm front and +35mm rear offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear). Brake system upgrade to a Brembo GT-R kit (6-piston front calipers, 4-piston rear, 380mm front rotors, 355mm rear rotors) with custom stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
